en.prelude_storybook.storybook_intro.002.te:
Long ago,

there was a mermaid princess who could never become human.
en.prelude_storybook.storybook_intro.003.te:
She fell in love with the light above the sea.

And she fell in love
with the person who came from within that light.
en.prelude_storybook.storybook_intro.004.te:
And so,

she journeyed to the oldest temple in the deep sea.

There, she sought the witch's help.
en.prelude_storybook.storybook_intro.005.te:
The witch warned her:

"If you wish to gain two legs,

you must lose your voice."
en.prelude_storybook.storybook_intro.006.te:
And every step would bring terrible pain.

Even so,
she still agreed.
en.prelude_storybook.storybook_intro.007.te:
And so,

she left the familiar deep sea behind.

She walked toward that light.
en.prelude_storybook.storybook_intro.008.te:
She wanted to tell him
who she truly was.

But she could no longer speak.
en.prelude_storybook.storybook_intro.009.te:
But in the end,

that human did not love her.

She became foam upon the sea.

zh_TW.prelude_storybook.storybook_intro.002.te:
很久以前，

有一位無法成為人類的人魚公主。
zh_TW.prelude_storybook.storybook_intro.003.te:
她愛上了海面上的光。

也愛上了，
那個來自光中的人。
zh_TW.prelude_storybook.storybook_intro.004.te:
於是，

她前往深海最古老的神殿。

尋求巫師的幫助。
zh_TW.prelude_storybook.storybook_intro.005.te:
巫師警告她：

「想獲得雙腳，

就必須失去聲音。」
zh_TW.prelude_storybook.storybook_intro.006.te:
而且，
每一步都會十分痛苦。

即使如此，
她仍然答應了。
zh_TW.prelude_storybook.storybook_intro.007.te:
於是，

她離開了熟悉的深海。

向著那道光走去。
zh_TW.prelude_storybook.storybook_intro.008.te:
她想告訴他，
自己是誰。

可是，
她再也無法說話。
zh_TW.prelude_storybook.storybook_intro.009.te:
可是最後，

那個人類沒有愛上她。

她變成了海上的泡泡。
